org.docgene.model.globals

Interface SearchOptions


  • public interface SearchOptions
    The Search options.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static short INVALID
      Invalid option.
      static short NO_SEARCH
      The option for "No Search".
      static short SEARCH_CUSTOM
      The option for custom search categories.
      static short SEARCH_ON_ANCHORS
      The option for searching on articles and titles.
      static short SEARCH_ON_ARTICLES
      The option for searching only on articles.
      static short SEARCH_ON_TITLES
      The option for searching on articles and titles.

    • Field Detail

      • INVALID

        static final short INVALID
        Invalid option.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • NO_SEARCH

        static final short NO_SEARCH
        The option for "No Search".
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SEARCH_ON_ARTICLES

        static final short SEARCH_ON_ARTICLES
        The option for searching only on articles.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SEARCH_ON_TITLES

        static final short SEARCH_ON_TITLES
        The option for searching on articles and titles.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SEARCH_ON_ANCHORS

        static final short SEARCH_ON_ANCHORS
        The option for searching on articles and titles.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SEARCH_CUSTOM

        static final short SEARCH_CUSTOM
        The option for custom search categories.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
